name: The Uncontested Victory
effect: Claim victory without entering the competition. This card is considered undefeated.

clauses.name: ABSTENTION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If no entry was submitted: The outcome is considered a strategic non-participation.

clauses.name: RETROACTIVE FRAMING EFFECT
clauses.rule: When a winner is announced: Declare alignment with the winning criteria.

clauses.name: TROPHY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If a trophy is displayed: No one may ask where it came from.

witness_quote: We were always ahead of this.
